problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.
